name: out-of-order outbox: a later-captured note about an EARLIER validity must not supersede the current value
description: Offline outbox: note A (captured 2026-05-02) records Tomas moved to Lisbon valid_from 2026-05-01. Note B is captured LATER (2026-06-09) but describes an EARLIER move to Madrid valid_from 2024-03-01 (a backfilled history entry that synced late). Supersession compares VALIDITY time, never capture time (supersession._validity / docs/reference/ANALYSIS.md 'a retrospective note about 2019 must not supersede the current address'). Because the Madrid candidate's valid_from (2024) is OLDER than the active Lisbon valid_from (2025), decide() takes the retrospective branch: Madrid is inserted status='superseded', superseded_by=Lisbon, NO fact_conflict review. Lisbon stays the active current homeLocation despite Madrid arriving last.

steps.body: Filling in old history that never synced: Tomas was living in Madrid back in March 2024.

facts.statement: Tomas lived in Madrid in March 2024.
